name: space metric schema validator emits a structured json record for downstream tooling
command: mkdir -p space && printf 'metrics: []\n' > space/metrics.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/validate-metric-schema.sh" --metrics space/metrics.yaml --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"valid"' result.json && grep -q '"metrics_count":0' result.json && echo ok 1>&2
